topic: My back seat is soaking wet every morning and smells of lake water.
title: My Back Seat Is Soaked With Lake Water Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My back seat was soaking wet every morning, and it smelled of lake water.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark car back seat with damp fabric and a puddle in the footwell, dim grey dawn, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I park in a covered garage. It never rains inside.
scenes.image_prompt: a dry concrete garage interior with a single parked car, overhead bulb, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The nearest lake is forty miles away.
scenes.image_prompt: a still dark lake at dawn surrounded by reeds, heavy fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water was cold and left green weeds on the seat.
scenes.image_prompt: strands of dark green lake weed draped over a damp car seat, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dried it. By dawn it was soaked again.
scenes.image_prompt: a soaked car footwell with water pooling, faint morning light through tinted glass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The carpet held the shape of someone sitting there.
scenes.image_prompt: a wet impression in the back seat cushion shaped like a seated form, dim cabin, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I set a towel down and a camera overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: a folded towel on a car back seat with a small camera clipped to the headrest, dark cabin, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The footage showed the seat darken with water at three in the morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a grainy night camera frame of a back seat slowly soaking dark, faint glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then wet footprints led from the seat to the garage door.
scenes.image_prompt: dark wet footprints crossing a concrete garage floor toward a closed door, dim bulb, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a single muddy shoe sat in the footwell, not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: a single waterlogged shoe sitting in a damp car footwell, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A girl had drowned in that lake decades ago, they told me.
scenes.image_prompt: an old faded newspaper clipping about a lake on a kitchen table, dim lamp, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the water reached the front seat, still rising.
scenes.image_prompt: a car driver footwell beginning to fill with dark water, dim dashboard glow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
